Tracker Dokara:
Listen very carefully. I will tell you about the enemies that you will face.
Kasha Orc Warders are the most dangerous. You need to kill them first. If you don't dispatch them quickly, they will use their defensive magic and stall for time.
They will also call upon their assistants. They will attack you from distance with magic that causes confusion. You need to kill them as quickly as possible before they have time to finish their attack.
Keep that all in mind and you just might survive. Is everything clear?
